title: Create Your Legal Document in <highlight>Just 3 Steps</highlight>
subtitle: No legal expertise required. Our platform is designed to be intuitive and easy, while ensuring professionalism and full legal compliance.

steps.title: Choose the Right Template
steps.desc: Browse our library of 500+ lawyer-approved legal templates. Use smart filters to find what you need in seconds.

steps.title: Customize with Ease
steps.desc: An intuitive visual editor lets you edit text, add your details, and adjust formatting without any technical complexity.

steps.title: Export & Share Instantly
steps.desc: Export your document in multiple formats (PDF, Word, DOCX) with optional digital signature, and share via secure link.
